_comment: Tracks skill versions across devices. Hash is MD5 of SKILL.md source. Bootstrap protocol (bsync.sh) compares this against installed versions.

comms.changelog: Added real auto-send for Email channel via Gmail Apps Script + hidden HTML marker. Skill now defaults to send mode (email delivered in ~5 min); draft-only mode is opt-in via explicit 'draft' keyword. Apps Script source at bhub/apps-script/claude-auto-send.gs — one-time deployment in Gmail required.

handoff.changelog: Added explicit parallelism rule to 'handoff here' — Steps 3 & 4 (read master + app HANDOFF + strategy docs) must fire as a single parallel tool batch, not sequentially. Reduces bootstrap dead time.

dev-deploy.changelog: Removed redundant bootstrap preamble (handoff skill already handles this). Fixed manifest hash to match actual installed content across all devices.

expert.changelog: Added Consequence Check & Red Team layer — auto-triggers adversarial audit on high-stakes recommendations via 3-lens evaluation (direct downside, coherence risk, unforeseeable surface area)

hc-strategy.changelog: Initial release — HC strategic brain with operating plan, expert research, quarterly review protocol. Hash corrected April 9 to match actual source.
hc-strategy.archived_note: Superseded by tnb-strategy as of April 3, 2026. Repo remains for reference but no longer actively maintained.

tnb-strategy.changelog: Initial release — The New Builder strategic brain. Replaces hc-strategy. TNB positioning, War Room product architecture, transition plan from HC.

pm.changelog: Initial release — product manager skill. Discovery interview → brief with acceptance criteria → implementation plan → build enforcement with soft gates and check-ins → delivery verification. Includes B-Suite UX Standards reference doc.

create-content.changelog: Initial git-tracked release — newsletter co-writing partner with voice DNA, style guide, newsletter patterns, LinkedIn patterns, and core teachings reference files. Promoted from local-only Cowork skill.

priority-startup-intel.changelog: First manifest entry. Added Delivery Failure Protocol: if Gmail draft creation fails, agent saves fallback HTML, pings Brain Inbox via handoff-notify API, and surfaces failure explicitly instead of silent save. Clarified Gmail MCP tool name guidance (create_draft, with ToolSearch fallback) to survive MCP upgrades.
